info.title: EngageBay CRM REST API
info.description: EngageBay is an all-in-one marketing, sales, and support CRM. This API provides access to contacts, companies, deals, tracks, events, tasks, notes, forms, sequences, lists, owners, custom fields, tickets, tags, products, and broadcasts.
